steps.title: Spot the explanation signal
steps.content:
The word “particularly” introduces a specific explanation for the preceding claim.
It connects “advertisers hesitated to jump into a new space” with the concrete reason: “the manufacturing of new television sets was stalled due to the US's involvement in World War II.”

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content:
The phrase gives a specific reason (WWII manufacturing delays) for why advertisers hesitated to support television, which directly matches what choice B describes.
The other choices reference comparisons between radio and TV, broadcaster persuasion tactics, and programming popularity — none of which the phrase does.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
